modules.title: Everything an HRD needs. In one window.
modules.subtitle: Click any module to see what it does and what's inside.

short.career-tracks: A clear growth path for everyone

ai-assessment.summary: An AI assistant runs a structured interview against your competencies and produces a comparable profile in 25 minutes. HRDs get an objective signal without burning out hiring managers.

career-tracks.summary: Career tracks with stages, tests and check-points — from intern to leader. Employees see what's next, HRDs see where growth stalls.

performance.summary: Goals, OKRs, check-ins, 1:1s and reviews in a single feed. Managers see who's carrying the team and who's stuck — without spreadsheet wars.

university.summary: A corporate university: courses, tests, certificates. Tied to career-track stages so learning serves the business — not a checkbox.

analytics.summary: Live analytics across the employee lifecycle: attrition, engagement, role readiness, people ROI. Dashboards a CEO actually reads.

digital-passport.summary: A unified employee profile with full history: roles, skills, assessments, learning, awards. One source of truth instead of five spreadsheets.

leaves.summary: Leave requests, day balance, overtime and approvals — one calendar, no email or chat ping-pong.

recognition.summary: Kudos feed and recognition points from peers and managers. Recognition becomes a daily habit, not a quarterly campaign.

gamification.summary: Levels, badges and progress for platform activity. Turns growth into a game people actually want to play.

shop.summary: A corporate shop on internal currency: merch, days off, learning. Motivation without growing payroll.

onboarding.summary: XLSX bulk import, auto-assigning roles by email domain and tracks by position. New hires productive from day one.

hr-policies.summary: All HR policies, rules and guides in one versioned base. Employees find answers themselves — HR doesn't get pinged.

internal-chat.summary: 1:1 and group chats inside the platform. HR comms don't dissolve into Telegram and stay in the employee's context.

rag-ai.summary: A RAG-powered AI assistant over your documents: policies, rules, knowledge bases. Answers employees with source links.

scenarios.summary: A builder for interview scenarios, assessment tests and cases. HRDs define the logic — the system runs it and collects results.

org-structure.summary: Company tree with file import and AI parsing. Structure changes in one click, no email thread with IT.

manager.after: Bulk import, AI assessments, tracks auto-assigned. 60% of her time freed up.

finalCta.title: Stand up your HR-OS in a day
finalCta.subtitle: A 30-minute call: we'll show how Career Track OS replaces your five tools and where it saves tens of hours per week.

items.a: From 30 minutes to 1 day. The onboarding wizard walks through org structure, positions, tests, tracks and invitations. Bulk employee import via XLSX/CSV.
Yes. Docker, nginx and install.sh are supported. Bring your own AI provider (Gemini / GigaChat / YandexGPT / OpenAI-compatible) — data stays within your perimeter.
Multi-tenant architecture with database-level RLS: company data is fully isolated. Roles live in a separate table with security-definer functions and audit.

AI assessment, career tracks, performance, digital passport, org structure, learning, leaves, recognition, points shop, HR policies, internal chats, RAG documents, assessment scenarios and HRD analytics.

items.q: Can we use just a subset of modules?
items.a: Yes. Enable what you need at launch — the rest can be turned on later without migrations. Pricing scales with active headcount.

items.q: Is it suitable for small business?
items.a: Yes, from 10 employees. Cloud SaaS from $12/employee/month. Get in touch and we'll quote for you.
